text:

Log:
  MFC r346490:

  Typo fix in ipfw.8: amd -> and

  There is an (obvious) typo in the following sentence:

  "Please note, that keep-state amd limit imply implicit check-state for ..."

  Replace the "amd" with "and", bump .Dd.
